/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fno-operator-names -fno-exceptions -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wformat-security -Wno-long-long -Wpointer-arith -Wundef -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Werror=return-type -Werror=init-self -Werror=undef -Wvla -Wdate-time -Wsuggest-override -Wlogical-op -pedantic -Wzero-as-null-pointer-constant -Wmissing-include-dirs -g -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--enable-new-dtags  -shared  -o ../../bin/lingmo/kcms/kinfocenter/kcm_interrupts.so CMakeFiles/kcm_interrupts.dir/kcm_interrupts_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kcm_interrupts.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kcm_interrupts.dir/qrc_kcm_interrupts.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lingmo/project/nx_pkg/systeminfo/build/bin: /usr/lib/libKF6KCMUtilsQuick.so.6.4.0 ../../bin/libSystemInfoInternal.so /usr/lib/libKF6KCMUtilsCore.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ConfigCore.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6CoreAddons.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6I18n.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.7.2 /usr/lib/libQt6QmlBuiltins.a /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.7.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.7.2
